blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 16 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 554 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder.
